S.FORM: I 1958 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 25 a romi'ad masofoc ci Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Costa riga anini i ci Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 8 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …æo~u~uis *o~u~ui…æ…æ…ôrmo~u so~u…æ*s , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~usta ri*a anini i ¶i …æo~u~uis *o~u~ui…æ…æ…ôrmo~u so~u…æ*s, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: I 1958 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 25 a romi'ad masofoc ci Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Costa riga anini i ci Luis Guillermo Sol√≠s, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 8 a romi'ad.
